hooks.command: input=$(cat); skill=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty'); if [ "$skill" = "log" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "The log skill is yours to invoke — type /log yourself."}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bsed\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "sed is banned — it destroyed days of work. Use the Edit tool instead."}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | perl -ne 'exit 0 if /\b(echo|printf|cat)\s[^|;&]*(?<!\d)>(?!\/dev\/null)(?![&>])/; exit 1'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "Direct file writes via Bash are banned. Use the Write or Edit tool instead."}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (reset --hard|push --force([^-]|$)|push -f|rebase -i)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "Destructive git command blocked (--force-with-lease is allowed). Run it yourself if you mean it."}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'doing\.md'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "doing.md cannot be touched directly. Use the doing CLI."}}'; fi
